tasks.title: Repository & pnpm Workspace Foundation
tasks.description: Developers clone the-abyss, run pnpm install, dan semua workspace packages langsung siap dalam <2 menit. Single source of truth dengan satu Git repository dan pnpm workspace.
tasks.details: Hamster Parent: SEN-1 (entity: ac782654-8b5c-4c56-b3fb-aca81a26ac55). DONE: .git/ aktif, pnpm-workspace.yaml ada (apps/**, packages/**, tooling/**, flows/**), root package.json (name: the-abyss, node >=22, pnpm >=9.15.0), .npmrc implisit. CATATAN: Husky belum dipasang — CI gates dipakai sebagai pengganti pre-commit hooks.
tasks.testStrategy: pnpm install selesai tanpa error; pnpm ls --depth 0 menampilkan semua workspace members.

subtasks.title: Initialize Git Repository with Version Control Conventions and Husky Hooks
subtasks.description: Initialize Git repository dengan .gitignore, .gitattributes, dan Husky lifecycle hooks.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-13 (entity: 67974976-b267-4c81-b2f4-b504136421d8). DONE: .git/ aktif, .gitignore komprehensif (80 baris). PARTIAL: Husky tidak dipasang — diganti CI gates (GO-Gate via Iskandar Gatekeeper). .gitattributes tidak ditemukan.
subtasks.testStrategy: Git repo aktif; .gitignore mencakup node_modules, dist, .env, .turbo.

subtasks.title: Configure pnpm Workspace with Root package.json and Workspace Manifest
subtasks.description: Buat pnpm-workspace.yaml, root package.json, dan .npmrc.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-21 (entity: ee5f35a2-1bdb-4353-b2a9-1a112d07c515). DONE: pnpm-workspace.yaml (4 glob: apps/**, packages/**, tooling/**, flows/**). Root package.json lengkap dengan engines, scripts, devDependencies. packageManager: pnpm@9.15.0.
subtasks.testStrategy: pnpm install berhasil; semua 21 workspace members terdeteksi.

tasks.title: Turborepo Build Pipeline
tasks.description: Turborepo build pipeline agar developer hanya rebuild yang berubah. Remote caching supaya CI dan local berbagi build artifacts.
tasks.details: Hamster Parent: SEN-2 (entity: 8a613e82-cbcc-45af-b3b8-057235b03249). DONE: turbo.json ada dengan 13 task definitions (build, test, lint, dev, db:*, flows:test, clean, typecheck). Remote cache dan boundary rules perlu verifikasi.
tasks.testStrategy: pnpm turbo run build berhasil; cache hits untuk packages yang tidak berubah.

subtasks.title: Configure Turborepo Task Pipeline with Dependency Ordering and Caching
subtasks.description: Buat root turbo.json dengan task pipeline: build, test, lint, dev, format, clean.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-11 (entity: 21abd633-0853-4f0f-9bd0-6d9dcb111cb8). DONE: turbo.json lengkap — build (dependsOn: ^build, outputs: dist/**/,.next/**), test, lint, dev (persistent, no cache), db:*, flows:test, clean, typecheck. Global env vars terdefinisi.
subtasks.testStrategy: turbo run build berjalan dengan topological order yang benar.

subtasks.title: Configure and Validate Turborepo Remote Cache Provider
subtasks.description: Konfigurasi remote caching backend supaya build artifacts di-share antar developer dan CI.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-17 (entity: 8143069d-676b-4e71-84d6-8e36b3d251c8). BELUM TERVERIFIKASI: .turbo/ ada tapi remote cache (TURBO_TOKEN, TURBO_TEAM) belum dikonfirmasi aktif. Perlu setup Vercel Remote Cache atau self-hosted.
subtasks.testStrategy: Build kedua menunjukkan 'FULL TURBO' cache hits; CI pipeline menggunakan remote cache.

subtasks.title: Implement Architectural Boundary Rules with Domain Tags
subtasks.description: ESLint import/no-restricted-paths untuk mencegah cross-domain imports antar Healthcare, Academic, Incubator, Internal.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-24 (entity: 2ed059df-21c6-410e-a017-9f97ee56e858). BELUM: packages/config-eslint/ hanya berisi package.json tanpa konfigurasi ESLint boundary rules. Perlu implementasi eslint-plugin-boundaries atau import/no-restricted-paths.
subtasks.testStrategy: File test yang import dari apps/healthcare/ di apps/academic/ memicu ESLint error.

subtasks.title: Configure Turborepo Affected Detection and Workspace Build Scripts
subtasks.description: Wire up turbo --filter=[HEAD^1] di root package.json scripts untuk incremental execution.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-27 (entity: fc8358ce-5b2a-4e0e-9bd4-40c3e0a8c0b4). DONE: Root package.json punya scripts build, test, lint, typecheck yang memanggil turbo. CI workflow ci.yml menggunakan affected detection.
subtasks.testStrategy: Setelah ubah satu package, pnpm build hanya rebuild package itu dan dependents-nya.

tasks.title: TypeScript & Code Quality Standards
tasks.description: TypeScript strict mode dan ESLint rules ditegakkan secara konsisten di seluruh workspace. Zero-defect quality baseline.
tasks.details: Hamster Parent: SEN-3 (entity: a1813520-d6ac-4847-8d10-7aba7bd3956c). Root tsconfig DONE. Config packages ada tapi config-eslint masih skeleton. lint-staged belum dipasang.
tasks.testStrategy: pnpm lint pass tanpa error; TypeScript strict mode menangkap any-type; prettier format konsisten.

subtasks.title: Configure Root TypeScript with Strict Mode and Path Aliases
subtasks.description: Root tsconfig.json sebagai baseline TypeScript untuk seluruh monorepo.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-9 (entity: d2086067-a5da-488a-88fa-0c0df722e2f6). DONE: tsconfig.json — target ES2022, module ESNext, moduleResolution bundler, strict: true. 9 path aliases (@the-abyss/*) terdefinisi.
subtasks.testStrategy: tsc --noEmit berhasil dari root.

subtasks.title: Create the Shareable TypeScript Config Package
subtasks.description: packages/config-typescript sebagai shareable presets (base, react, node).
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-15 (entity: 66a86085-1c76-4a0c-9d9e-3efc31d88b9c). DONE: packages/config-typescript/ ada dengan package.json dan tsconfig.json.
subtasks.testStrategy: Setiap workspace package extends shared preset; tsc --noEmit pass.

subtasks.title: Install Code Quality Dependencies and Configure Root ESLint Rules
subtasks.description: Install TypeScript ESLint plugins dan buat root ESLint config.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-20 (entity: bc9561cc-fdf4-435c-81b1-b3828643b46d). PARTIAL: packages/config-eslint/ ada tapi hanya package.json — belum ada konfigurasi ESLint rules. Root .eslintrc.json tidak ditemukan. eslint@^9.0.0 ada di devDependencies tapi config belum ditulis.
subtasks.testStrategy: pnpm lint berjalan di semua packages; any-type dan disordered imports ditandai error.

subtasks.title: Create Shareable ESLint Config Package and lint-staged Integration
subtasks.description: packages/config-eslint dengan base/react/node configs. lint-staged di root package.json. .prettierignore.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-26 (entity: 934b393a-593c-44ff-9dc8-687ede2662f5). BELUM: lint-staged tidak ada di package.json. .prettierrc ada tapi .prettierignore tidak ditemukan. config-eslint package masih skeleton.
subtasks.testStrategy: Stage file dengan lint errors → commit otomatis trigger auto-fix.

tasks.title: Monorepo Directory Structure & Agent Scaffolding
tasks.description: Seluruh directory topology dan AI agent governance scaffolding terinisialisasi. Setiap team member dan AI agent bisa navigasi tanpa ambiguitas.
tasks.details: Hamster Parent: SEN-4 (entity: d542ab02-573d-4839-8b82-827e49146e15). DONE: 7 apps, 12 packages, 2 tooling, flows/, docs/, infrastructure/ semuanya ada. .agents/ hierarchy lengkap dengan domain-specific AGENTS.md.
tasks.testStrategy: Semua directory ada; setiap major folder punya README; .agents/ hierarchy lengkap.

subtasks.title: Create Complete Monorepo Directory Topology
subtasks.description: Buat semua directory, .gitkeep markers, dan section-level READMEs.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-12 (entity: b3869d99-838c-44e0-a950-29406277603d). DONE: apps/ (5 domain, 7 apps), packages/ (12 packages), tooling/ (2), flows/ (3 subdirs), docs/ (7 subdirs), infrastructure/ (3 subdirs). README.md ada di apps/ dan packages/.
subtasks.testStrategy: Semua expected directories ada.

subtasks.title: Scaffold Minimal package.json Manifests for All Workspace Members
subtasks.description: package.json untuk semua workspace packages dan applications.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-18 (entity: 70608f53-b13d-47ae-a262-1c68b79577a6). DONE: 21 workspace members (7 apps + 12 packages + 2 tooling) semuanya punya package.json.
subtasks.testStrategy: pnpm install resolves semua members; pnpm ls menampilkan semua packages.

subtasks.title: Initialize .agents/ Governance Hierarchy
subtasks.description: .agents/ dengan global AGENTS.md, domain-specific steering files, skills/, prompts/, MCP config.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-23 (entity: c6c45ee6-a661-424b-acff-38a7d143e08f). DONE: .agents/AGENTS.md (global), .agents/HANDOFF.md, .agents/MCP-CONFIG.json, .agents/prompts/, .agents/skills/. Domain AGENTS.md di apps/healthcare/, apps/academic/, apps/incubator/, apps/internal/, apps/orchestrator/.
subtasks.testStrategy: Semua AGENTS.md ada dengan domain-specific steering content.

subtasks.title: Create HANDOFF.md Template and Inaugural ADR
subtasks.description: docs/templates/HANDOFF.md dan docs/adr/0001-monorepo-strategy.md.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-28 (entity: 5b73ba68-b1b6-422b-b1ae-3c326696d559). PARTIAL: HANDOFF.md ada di .agents/HANDOFF.md DAN docs/templates/HANDOFF.md. Tapi docs/adr/ hanya berisi README.md — belum ada ADR aktual (0001-monorepo-strategy.md dll).
subtasks.testStrategy: HANDOFF.md template lengkap; ADR-0001 mengikuti format Context/Decision/Consequences.

tasks.title: Developer Documentation & Onboarding
tasks.description: Dokumentasi yang memandu engineer baru dari nol sampai kontribusi pertama dalam <30 menit.
tasks.details: Hamster Parent: SEN-5 (entity: 11a2dca9-4210-4c08-a839-2fc6c4712321). README dan CONTRIBUTING ada. Tapi onboarding guides kosong, ADRs belum ditulis, .editorconfig tidak ada.
tasks.testStrategy: Engineer baru bisa ikuti docs dari clone sampai build pertama dalam <30 menit.

subtasks.title: Author Root README.md
subtasks.description: README.md sebagai single entry point untuk memahami The Abyss.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-7 (entity: 455f8b9a-45e6-460c-af6a-8c7c35f73930). DONE: README.md komprehensif — overview, architecture diagram, badges CI/license/node/pnpm, quick start, project structure.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ikuti instruksi README → pnpm install && pnpm turbo run build berhasil.

subtasks.title: Author CONTRIBUTING.md and .editorconfig
subtasks.description: CONTRIBUTING.md dengan workflow lengkap. .editorconfig untuk IDE-agnostic formatting.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-10 (entity: 92affbfb-4430-473d-965e-9f8feb9be49f). PARTIAL: CONTRIBUTING.md ada dan lengkap (Code of Conduct, Getting Started, Commit Guidelines, PR Process, Claudesy Workflow). BELUM: .editorconfig tidak ada.
subtasks.testStrategy: .editorconfig direspek oleh VS Code; CONTRIBUTING.md cocok dengan enforcement hooks.

subtasks.title: Create Developer Onboarding Guides
subtasks.description: docs/guides/ — getting-started.md, workspace-setup.md, code-quality.md.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-16 (entity: 1cf545c9-854e-4b36-9a77-8cb167de5e08). BELUM: docs/guides/ ada tapi kosong. Belum ada getting-started.md, workspace-setup.md, atau code-quality.md.
subtasks.testStrategy: Setiap guide self-contained; mengikuti langkah-langkah menghasilkan outcome yang benar.

subtasks.title: Author Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)
subtasks.description: 6 ADRs di docs/adr/ untuk semua keputusan desain Phase 1.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-22 (entity: 181cc22c-e3a7-4c11-ba77-1f1c595cb9ca). BELUM: docs/adr/ hanya berisi README.md. Belum ada ADR aktual: 0001-monorepo-strategy, 0002-pnpm-over-npm, 0003-turborepo-pipeline, 0004-domain-boundaries, 0005-agent-governance, 0006-typescript-strict.
subtasks.testStrategy: 6 ADR ada di docs/adr/; format Context/Decision/Consequences.

tasks.title: CI/CD Governance Pipeline
tasks.description: CI/CD pipeline otomatis validasi code quality, architectural boundaries, dan governance requirements di setiap pull request.
tasks.details: Hamster Parent: SEN-6 (entity: 5a4799f6-2c04-472f-b3b6-e01d48e2b6dd). DONE: ci.yml (211 baris, 7 jobs), security-scan.yml, auto-fix.yml, pr-label.yml. CODEOWNERS lengkap. PR template ada. GO-Gate via Iskandar Gatekeeper.
tasks.testStrategy: PR dengan boundary violation diblok CI; PR clean berhasil merge; GO-Gate memerlukan HANDOFF.md.

subtasks.title: Implement Core CI Workflow
subtasks.description: .github/workflows/ci.yml dengan lint, type-check, build, test menggunakan Turborepo.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-8 (entity: 129f85ad-3fbe-411f-aae9-c37b8e87165a). DONE: ci.yml 211 baris, 7 jobs: verify → build → test → lint → security → flows. Concurrency control, artifact upload, coverage.
subtasks.testStrategy: Push ke PR memicu CI; semua jobs selesai; cache digunakan di run berikutnya.

subtasks.title: Configure Architectural Boundary Enforcement CI Job
subtasks.description: Job architecture-validation di CI yang menjalankan ESLint boundary rules.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-14 (entity: 0720debf-eedf-43fd-b85b-4694cff35bbb). DONE: lint job di ci.yml mencakup ESLint across workspace. Catatan: boundary rules perlu config-eslint diisi dulu (lihat Task 3.3).
subtasks.testStrategy: PR dengan cross-domain import diblok oleh lint job.

subtasks.title: Establish CODEOWNERS Governance and PR Template
subtasks.description: .github/CODEOWNERS dan .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-19 (entity: 3343d7e1-e19e-4ebe-95ac-adc7874b3c4b). DONE: CODEOWNERS lengkap — domain ownership per folder (healthcare, academic, incubator, internal, orchestrator, flows, infra, docs). PR template ada.
subtasks.testStrategy: PR yang menyentuh apps/healthcare/ memerlukan review dari owner.

subtasks.title: Scaffold GO-Gate Verification CI Job
subtasks.description: Workflow manual dispatch yang validasi HANDOFF.md sebelum deployment.
subtasks.details: Hamster: SEN-25 (entity: 86416b54-fe7e-49ed-99bf-92404f630e74). DONE: verify job di ci.yml menggunakan Iskandar Gatekeeper untuk GO-Gate check dan HANDOFF.md validation. Juga ada security-scan.yml terpisah.
subtasks.testStrategy: Dispatch tanpa HANDOFF.md gagal; dispatch dengan HANDOFF.md approved lanjut ke deployment.
